4033 {
4034 parser()->tokenizer.setStateHtmlOnly();

4042 {

4044 retval = parser()->tokenizer.lex();

4058 break;
4059 case CMD_LATEXONLY:
4060 {
4061 parser()->tokenizer.setStateLatexOnly();
4062 retval = parser()->tokenizer.lex();

4065 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
4066 }
4067 break;
4068 case CMD_XMLONLY:
4069 {
4070 parser()->tokenizer.setStateXmlOnly();
4071 retval = parser()->tokenizer.lex();
4072 children().append<DocVerbatim>(parser(),thisVariant(),parser()->context.context,parser()->context.token->verb,DocVerbatim::XmlOnly,parser()->context.isExample,parser()->context.exampleName);
4073 if (retval==0) warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"xmlonly section ended without end marker");
4074 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
4075 }
4076 break;
4077 case CMD_DBONLY:
4078 {
4079 parser()->tokenizer.setStateDbOnly();
4080 retval = parser()->tokenizer.lex();

4082 if (retval==0) warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"docbookonly section ended without end marker");
4083 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
4084 }
4085 break;
4086 case CMD_ILITERAL:
4087 {
4088 DocVerbatim::Type t = DocVerbatim::JavaDocLiteral;
4089 parser()->tokenizer.setStateILiteralOpt();
4090 retval = parser()->tokenizer.lex();
4091
4092 QCString fullMatch = parser()->context.token->verb;
4093 int idx = fullMatch.find('{');
4094 int idxEnd = fullMatch.find("}",idx+1);
4095 StringVector optList;
4096 if (idx != -1) // options present
4097 {
4098 QCString optStr = fullMatch.mid(idx+1,idxEnd-idx-1).stripWhiteSpace();
4099 optList = split(optStr.str(),",");
4100 for (const auto &opt : optList)
4101 {
4102 if (opt.empty()) continue;
4103 QCString locOpt(opt);
4104 locOpt = locOpt.stripWhiteSpace().lower();
4105 if (locOpt == "code")
4106 {
4107 t = DocVerbatim::JavaDocCode;
4108 }
4109 else if (!locOpt.isEmpty())
4110 {
4111 warn(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(), "Unknown option '%s' for '\\iliteral'",qPrint(opt));
4112 }
4113 }
4114 }
4115
4116 parser()->tokenizer.setStateILiteral();
4117 retval = parser()->tokenizer.lex();
4118 children().append<DocVerbatim>(parser(),thisVariant(),parser()->context.context,parser()->context.token->verb,t,parser()->context.isExample,parser()->context.exampleName);
4119 if (retval==0)
4120 {
4121 if (t == DocVerbatim::JavaDocCode)
4122 {
4123 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"javadoc code section ended without end marker");
4124 }
4125 else
4126 {
4127 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"javadoc literal section ended without end marker");
4128 }
4129 }
4130 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
4131 }
4132 break;
4133 case CMD_IVERBATIM:
4134 case CMD_VERBATIM:
4135 {
4136 if (cmdId == CMD_VERBATIM)
4137 {
4138 parser()->tokenizer.setStateVerbatim();
4139 }
4140 else
4141 {
4142 parser()->tokenizer.setStateIVerbatim();
4143 }
4144 retval = parser()->tokenizer.lex();
4145 children().append<DocVerbatim>(parser(),thisVariant(),parser()->context.context,parser()->context.token->verb,DocVerbatim::Verbatim,parser()->context.isExample,parser()->context.exampleName);
4146 if (retval==0) warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"verbatim section ended without end marker");
4147 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
4148 }
4149 break;
4150 case CMD_DOT:
4151 {
4152 children().append<DocVerbatim>(parser(),thisVariant(),
4153 parser()->context.context,
4154 parser()->context.token->verb,
4155 DocVerbatim::Dot,
4156 parser()->context.isExample,
4157 parser()->context.exampleName);
4158 DocVerbatim *dv = children().get_last<DocVerbatim>();
4159 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
4160 QCString width,height;
4161 parser()->defaultHandleTitleAndSize(CMD_DOT,&children().back(),dv->children(),width,height);
4162 parser()->tokenizer.setStateDot();
4163 retval = parser()->tokenizer.lex();
4164 dv->setText(parser()->context.token->verb);
4165 dv->setWidth(width);
4166 dv->setHeight(height);
4167 dv->setLocation(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr());
4168 if (!Config_getBool(HAVE_DOT))
4169 {
4170 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"ignoring \\dot command because HAVE_DOT is not set");
4171 children().pop_back();
4172 }
4173 if (retval==0) warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"dot section ended without end marker");
4174 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
4175 }
4176 break;
4177 case CMD_MSC:
4178 {
4179 children().append<DocVerbatim>(parser(),thisVariant(),
4180 parser()->context.context,
4181 parser()->context.token->verb,
4182 DocVerbatim::Msc,
4183 parser()->context.isExample,
4184 parser()->context.exampleName);
4185 DocVerbatim *dv = children().get_last<DocVerbatim>();
4186 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
4187 QCString width,height;
4188 parser()->defaultHandleTitleAndSize(CMD_MSC,&children().back(),dv->children(),width,height);
4189 parser()->tokenizer.setStateMsc();
4190 retval = parser()->tokenizer.lex();
4191 dv->setText(parser()->context.token->verb);
4192 dv->setWidth(width);
4193 dv->setHeight(height);
4194 dv->setLocation(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr());
4195 if (retval==0)
4196 {
4197 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"msc section ended without end marker");
4198 }
4199 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
4200 }
4201 break;
4202 case CMD_STARTUML:
4203 {
4204 QCString jarPath = Config_getString(PLANTUML_JAR_PATH);
4205 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePlantUMLOpt();
4206 retval = parser()->tokenizer.lex();
4207 QCString fullMatch = parser()->context.token->sectionId;
4208 QCString sectionId = "";
4209 int idx = fullMatch.find('{');
4210 int idxEnd = fullMatch.find("}",idx+1);
4211 StringVector optList;
4212 QCString engine;
4213 if (idx != -1) // options present
4214 {
4215 QCString optStr = fullMatch.mid(idx+1,idxEnd-idx-1).stripWhiteSpace();
4216 optList = split(optStr.str(),",");
4217 for (const auto &opt : optList)
4218 {
4219 if (opt.empty()) continue;
4220 bool found = false;
4221 QCString locOpt(opt);
4222 locOpt = locOpt.stripWhiteSpace().lower();
4223 if (g_plantumlEngine.find(locOpt.str())!=g_plantumlEngine.end())
4224 {
4225 if (!engine.isEmpty())
4226 {
4227 warn(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(), "Multiple definition of engine for '\\startuml'");
4228 }
4229 engine = locOpt;
4230 found = true;
4231 }
4232 if (!found)
4233 {
4234 if (sectionId.isEmpty())
4235 {
4236 sectionId = opt;
4237 }
4238 else
4239 {
4240 warn(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Multiple use of filename for '\\startuml'");
4241 }
4242 }
4243 }
4244 }
4245 else
4246 {
4247 sectionId = parser()->context.token->sectionId;
4248 }
4249 if (engine.isEmpty()) engine = "uml";
4250
4251 if (sectionId.isEmpty())
4252 {
4253 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePlantUMLOpt();
4254 retval = parser()->tokenizer.lex();
4255 assert(retval==RetVal_OK);
4256
4257 sectionId = parser()->context.token->sectionId;
4258 sectionId = sectionId.stripWhiteSpace();
4259 }
4260
4261 QCString plantFile(sectionId);
4262 children().append<DocVerbatim>(parser(),thisVariant(),
4263 parser()->context.context,
4264 parser()->context.token->verb,
4265 DocVerbatim::PlantUML,
4266 FALSE,plantFile);
4267 DocVerbatim *dv = children().get_last<DocVerbatim>();
4268 dv->setEngine(engine);
4269 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
4270 QCString width,height;
4271 parser()->defaultHandleTitleAndSize(CMD_STARTUML,&children().back(),dv->children(),width,height);
4272 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePlantUML();
4273 retval = parser()->tokenizer.lex();
4274 int line = 0;
4275 QCString trimmedVerb = stripLeadingAndTrailingEmptyLines(parser()->context.token->verb,line);
4276 if (engine == "ditaa")
4277 {
4278 dv->setUseBitmap(true);
4279 }
4280 else if (engine == "uml")
4281 {
4282 int i = trimmedVerb.find('\n');
4283 QCString firstLine = i==-1 ? trimmedVerb : trimmedVerb.left(i);
4284 if (firstLine.stripWhiteSpace() == "ditaa") dv->setUseBitmap(true);
4285 }
4286 dv->setText(trimmedVerb);
4287 dv->setWidth(width);
4288 dv->setHeight(height);
4289 dv->setLocation(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr());
4290 if (jarPath.isEmpty())
4291 {
4292 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"ignoring \\startuml command because PLANTUML_JAR_PATH is not set");
4293 children().pop_back();
4294 }
4295 if (retval==0) warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"startuml section ended without end marker");
4296 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
4297 }
4298 break;
4299 case CMD_ENDPARBLOCK:
4300 retval=RetVal_EndParBlock;
4301 break;
4302 case CMD_ENDICODE:
4303 case CMD_ENDCODE:
4304 case CMD_ENDHTMLONLY:
4305 case CMD_ENDMANONLY:
4306 case CMD_ENDRTFONLY:
4307 case CMD_ENDLATEXONLY:
4308 case CMD_ENDXMLONLY:
4309 case CMD_ENDDBONLY:
4310 case CMD_ENDLINK:
4311 case CMD_ENDVERBATIM:
4312 case CMD_ENDIVERBATIM:
4313 case CMD_ENDILITERAL:
4314 case CMD_ENDDOT:
4315 case CMD_ENDMSC:
4316 case CMD_ENDUML:
4317 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"unexpected command %s",qPrint(parser()->context.token->name));
4318 break;
4319 case CMD_PARAM:
4320 retval = handleParamSection(cmdName,DocParamSect::Param,FALSE,parser()->context.token->paramDir);
4321 break;
4322 case CMD_TPARAM:
4323 retval = handleParamSection(cmdName,DocParamSect::TemplateParam,FALSE,parser()->context.token->paramDir);
4324 break;
4325 case CMD_RETVAL:
4326 retval = handleParamSection(cmdName,DocParamSect::RetVal);
4327 break;
4328 case CMD_EXCEPTION:
4329 retval = handleParamSection(cmdName,DocParamSect::Exception);
4330 break;
4331 case CMD_XREFITEM:
4332 retval = handleXRefItem();
4333 break;
4334 case CMD_LINEBREAK:
4335 {
4336 children().append<DocLineBreak>(parser(),thisVariant());
4337 }
4338 break;
4339 case CMD_IANCHOR:
4340 case CMD_ANCHOR:
4341 {
4342 parser()->handleAnchor(thisVariant(),children());
4343 }
4344 break;
4345 case CMD_ADDINDEX:
4346 {
4347 children().append<DocIndexEntry>(parser(),thisVariant(),
4348 parser()->context.scope!=Doxygen::globalScope?parser()->context.scope:0,
4349 parser()->context.memberDef);
4350 retval = children().get_last<DocIndexEntry>()->parse();
4351 }
4352 break;
4353 case CMD_INTERNAL:
4354 retval = RetVal_Internal;
4355 break;
4356 case CMD_ENDINTERNAL:
4357 retval = RetVal_EndInternal;
4358 break;
4359 case CMD_PARBLOCK:
4360 {
4361 children().append<DocParBlock>(parser(),thisVariant());
4362 retval = children().get_last<DocParBlock>()->parse();
4363 }
4364 break;
4365 case CMD_COPYDOC: // fall through
4366 case CMD_COPYBRIEF: // fall through
4367 case CMD_COPYDETAILS:
4368 //retval = RetVal_CopyDoc;
4369 // these commands should already be resolved by processCopyDoc()
4370 break;
4371 case CMD_INCLUDE:
4372 handleInclude(cmdName,DocInclude::Include);
4373 break;
4374 case CMD_INCWITHLINES:
4375 handleInclude(cmdName,DocInclude::IncWithLines);
4376 break;
4377 case CMD_DONTINCLUDE:
4378 handleInclude(cmdName,DocInclude::DontInclude);
4379 break;
4380 case CMD_HTMLINCLUDE:
4381 handleInclude(cmdName,DocInclude::HtmlInclude);
4382 break;
4383 case CMD_LATEXINCLUDE:
4384 handleInclude(cmdName,DocInclude::LatexInclude);
4385 break;
4386 case CMD_RTFINCLUDE:
4387 handleInclude(cmdName,DocInclude::RtfInclude);
4388 break;
4389 case CMD_MANINCLUDE:
4390 handleInclude(cmdName,DocInclude::ManInclude);
4391 break;
4392 case CMD_XMLINCLUDE:
4393 handleInclude(cmdName,DocInclude::XmlInclude);
4394 break;
4395 case CMD_DOCBOOKINCLUDE:
4396 handleInclude(cmdName,DocInclude::DocbookInclude);
4397 break;
4398 case CMD_VERBINCLUDE:
4399 handleInclude(cmdName,DocInclude::VerbInclude);
4400 break;
4401 case CMD_SNIPPET:
4402 handleInclude(cmdName,DocInclude::Snippet);
4403 break;
4404 case CMD_SNIPWITHLINES:
4405 handleInclude(cmdName,DocInclude::SnipWithLines);
4406 break;
4407 case CMD_INCLUDEDOC:
4408 handleInclude(cmdName,DocInclude::IncludeDoc);
4409 break;
4410 case CMD_SNIPPETDOC:
4411 handleInclude(cmdName,DocInclude::SnippetDoc);
4412 break;
4413 case CMD_SKIP:
4414 handleIncludeOperator(cmdName,DocIncOperator::Skip);
4415 break;
4416 case CMD_UNTIL:
4417 handleIncludeOperator(cmdName,DocIncOperator::Until);
4418 break;
4419 case CMD_SKIPLINE:
4420 handleIncludeOperator(cmdName,DocIncOperator::SkipLine);
4421 break;
4422 case CMD_LINE:
4423 handleIncludeOperator(cmdName,DocIncOperator::Line);
4424 break;
4425 case CMD_IMAGE:
4426 parser()->handleImage(thisVariant(),children());
4427 break;
4428 case CMD_DOTFILE:
4429 if (!Config_getBool(HAVE_DOT))
4430 {
4431 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),
4432 "ignoring \\dotfile command because HAVE_DOT is not set");
4433 }
4434 else
4435 {
4436 handleFile<DocDotFile>(cmdName);
4437 }
4438 break;
4439 case CMD_VHDLFLOW:
4440 handleVhdlFlow();
4441 break;
4442 case CMD_MSCFILE:
4443 handleFile<DocMscFile>(cmdName);
4444 break;
4445 case CMD_DIAFILE:
4446 handleFile<DocDiaFile>(cmdName);
4447 break;
4448 case CMD_LINK:
4449 handleLink(cmdName,FALSE);
4450 break;
4451 case CMD_JAVALINK:
4452 handleLink(cmdName,TRUE);
4453 break;
4454 case CMD_CITE:
4455 handleCite();
4456 break;
4457 case CMD_EMOJI:
4458 handleEmoji();
4459 break;
4460 case CMD_DOXYCONFIG:
4461 handleDoxyConfig();
4462 break;
4463 case CMD_REF: // fall through
4464 case CMD_SUBPAGE:
4465 handleRef(cmdName);
4466 break;
4467 case CMD_SECREFLIST:
4468 {
4469 children().append<DocSecRefList>(parser(),thisVariant());
4470 children().get_last<DocSecRefList>()->parse();
4471 }
4472 break;
4473 case CMD_SECREFITEM:
4474 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"unexpected command %s",qPrint(parser()->context.token->name));
4475 break;
4476 case CMD_ENDSECREFLIST:
4477 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"unexpected command %s",qPrint(parser()->context.token->name));
4478 break;
4479 case CMD_FORMULA:
4480 {
4481 children().append<DocFormula>(parser(),thisVariant(),parser()->context.token->id);
4482 }
4483 break;
4484 //case CMD_LANGSWITCH:
4485 // retval = handleLanguageSwitch();
4486 // break;
4487 case CMD_INTERNALREF:
4488 //warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"unexpected command %s",qPrint(parser()->context.token->name));
4489 {
4490 parser()->handleInternalRef(thisVariant(),children());
4491 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
4492 }
4493 break;
4494 case CMD_INHERITDOC:
4495 handleInheritDoc();
4496 break;
4497 case CMD_SHOWDATE:
4498 handleShowDate();
4499 break;
4500 case CMD_ILINE:
4501 handleILine();
4502 break;
4503 case CMD_IFILE:
4504 handleIFile();
4505 break;
4506 default:
4507 // we should not get here!
4508 ASSERT(0);
4509 break;
4510 }
4511 INTERNAL_ASSERT(retval==0 || retval==RetVal_OK || retval==RetVal_SimpleSec ||
4512 retval==TK_LISTITEM || retval==TK_ENDLIST || retval==TK_NEWPARA ||
4513 retval==RetVal_Section || retval==RetVal_EndList ||
4514 retval==RetVal_Internal || retval==RetVal_SwitchLang ||
4515 retval==RetVal_EndInternal
4516 );
4517 AUTO_TRACE_EXIT("retval={}",DocTokenizer::retvalToString(retval));
4518 return retval;
4519}
DocFormula
Node representing an item of a cross-referenced list.

3220{
3221 // get the argument of the cite command.
3222 int tok=parser()->tokenizer.lex();
3223 if (tok!=TK_WHITESPACE)
3224 {
3225 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"expected whitespace after \\doxyconfig command");
3226 return;
3227 }
3228 parser()->tokenizer.setStateDoxyConfig();
3229 tok=parser()->tokenizer.lex();
3230 if (tok==0)
3231 {
3232 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"unexpected end of comment block while parsing the "
3233 "argument of command \\doxyconfig");
3234 return;
3235 }
3236 else if (tok!=TK_WORD && tok!=TK_LNKWORD)
3237 {
3238 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"unexpected token %s as the argument of \\doxyconfig",
3239 DocTokenizer::tokToString(tok));
3240 return;
3241 }
3242 ConfigOption * opt = ConfigImpl::instance()->get(parser()->context.token->name);
3243 if (opt)
3244 {
3245 QCString optionValue;
3246 switch (opt->kind())
3247 {
3248 case ConfigOption::O_Bool:
3249 optionValue = *(static_cast<ConfigBool*>(opt)->valueStringRef());
3250 break;
3251 case ConfigOption::O_String:
3252 optionValue = *(static_cast<ConfigString*>(opt)->valueRef());
3253 break;
3254 case ConfigOption::O_Enum:
3255 optionValue = *(static_cast<ConfigEnum*>(opt)->valueRef());
3256 break;
3257 case ConfigOption::O_Int:
3258 optionValue = *(static_cast<ConfigInt*>(opt)->valueStringRef());
3259 break;
3260 case ConfigOption::O_List:
3261 {
3262 StringVector *lst = static_cast<ConfigList*>(opt)->valueRef();
3263 optionValue="";
3264 if (!lst->empty())
3265 {
3266 std::string lstFormat = theTranslator->trWriteList(static_cast<int>(lst->size())).str();
3267 static const reg::Ex marker(R"(@(\d+))");
3268 reg::Iterator it(lstFormat,marker);
3269 reg::Iterator end;
3270 size_t index=0;
3271 // now replace all markers with the real text
3272 for ( ; it!=end ; ++it)
3273 {
3274 const auto &match = *it;
3275 size_t newIndex = match.position();
3276 size_t matchLen = match.length();
3277 optionValue += lstFormat.substr(index,newIndex-index);
3278 unsigned long entryIndex = std::stoul(match[1].str());
3279 if (entryIndex<(unsigned long)lst->size())
3280 {
3281 optionValue += lst->at(entryIndex);
3282 }
3283 index=newIndex+matchLen;
3284 }
3285 optionValue+=lstFormat.substr(index);
3286 }
3287 }
3288 break;
3289 case ConfigOption::O_Obsolete:
3290 warn(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(), "Obsolete setting for '\\doxyconfig': '%s'",
3291 qPrint(parser()->context.token->name));
3292 break;
3293 case ConfigOption::O_Disabled:
3294 warn(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),
3295 "Disabled setting (i.e. not supported in this doxygen executable) for '\\doxyconfig': '%s'",
3296 qPrint(parser()->context.token->name));
3297 break;
3298 case ConfigOption::O_Info:
3299 // nothing to show here
3300 break;
3301 }
3302 if (!optionValue.isEmpty())
3303 {
3304 children().append<DocWord>(parser(),thisVariant(),optionValue);
3305 }
3306 }
3307 else
3308 {
3309 warn(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(), "Unknown option for '\\doxyconfig': '%s'",
3310 qPrint(parser()->context.token->name));
3311 children().append<DocWord>(parser(),thisVariant(),parser()->context.token->name);
3312 }
3313 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
3314}

◆ handleHtmlEndTag()

int DocPara::handleHtmlEndTag ( const QCString &  tagName)

Definition at line 4988 of file docnode.cpp.

4989{
4990 AUTO_TRACE("tagName={}",tagName);
4991 int tagId = Mappers::htmlTagMapper->map(tagName);
4992 int retval=RetVal_OK;
4993 switch (tagId)
4994 {
4995 case HTML_UL:
4996 if (!insideUL(thisVariant()))
4997 {
4998 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"found </ul> tag without matching <ul>");
4999 }
5000 else
5001 {
5002 retval=RetVal_EndList;
5003 }
5004 break;
5005 case HTML_OL:
5006 if (!insideOL(thisVariant()))
5007 {
5008 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"found </ol> tag without matching <ol>");
5009 }
5010 else
5011 {
5012 retval=RetVal_EndList;
5013 }
5014 break;
5015 case HTML_LI:
5016 if (!insideLI(thisVariant()))
5017 {
5018 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"found </li> tag without matching <li>");
5019 }
5020 else
5021 {
5022 // ignore </li> tags
5023 }
5024 break;
5025 case HTML_DETAILS:
5026 retval=RetVal_EndHtmlDetails;
5027 break;
5028 case HTML_BLOCKQUOTE:
5029 retval=RetVal_EndBlockQuote;
5030 break;
5031 case HTML_BOLD:
5032 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Bold,tagName);
5033 break;
5034 case HTML_S:
5035 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::S,"s");
5036 break;
5037 case HTML_STRIKE:
5038 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Strike,tagName);
5039 break;
5040 case HTML_DEL:
5041 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Del,tagName);
5042 break;
5043 case HTML_UNDERLINE:
5044 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Underline,tagName);
5045 break;
5046 case HTML_INS:
5047 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Ins,tagName);
5048 break;
5049 case HTML_CODE:
5050 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Code,tagName);
5051 break;
5052 case HTML_EMPHASIS:
5053 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Italic,tagName);
5054 break;
5055 case HTML_DIV:
5056 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Div,tagName);
5057 break;
5058 case HTML_SPAN:
5059 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Span,tagName);
5060 break;
5061 case HTML_SUB:
5062 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Subscript,tagName);
5063 break;
5064 case HTML_SUP:
5065 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Superscript,tagName);
5066 break;
5067 case HTML_CENTER:
5068 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Center,tagName);
5069 break;
5070 case HTML_SMALL:
5071 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Small,tagName);
5072 break;
5073 case HTML_CITE:
5074 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Cite,tagName);
5075 break;
5076 case HTML_PRE:
5077 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Preformatted,tagName);
5078 setInsidePreformatted(FALSE);
5079 parser()->tokenizer.setInsidePre(FALSE);
5080 break;
5081 case HTML_P:
5082 retval=TK_NEWPARA;
5083 break;
5084 case HTML_DL:
5085 retval=RetVal_EndDesc;
5086 break;
5087 case HTML_DT:
5088 // ignore </dt> tag
5089 break;
5090 case HTML_DD:
5091 // ignore </dd> tag
5092 break;
5093 case HTML_TABLE:
5094 retval=RetVal_EndTable;
5095 break;
5096 case HTML_TR:
5097 // ignore </tr> tag
5098 break;
5099 case HTML_TD:
5100 // ignore </td> tag
5101 break;
5102 case HTML_TH:
5103 // ignore </th> tag
5104 break;
5105 case HTML_THEAD:
5106 case HTML_TBODY:
5107 case HTML_TFOOT:
5108 // for time being ignore </t....> tag
5109 break;
5110 case HTML_CAPTION:
5111 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Unexpected tag </caption> found");
5112 break;
5113 case HTML_BR:
5114 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Illegal </br> tag found");
5115 break;
5116 case HTML_H1:
5117 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Unexpected tag </h1> found");
5118 break;
5119 case HTML_H2:
5120 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Unexpected tag </h2> found");
5121 break;
5122 case HTML_H3:
5123 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Unexpected tag </h3> found");
5124 break;
5125 case HTML_H4:
5126 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Unexpected tag </h4> found");
5127 break;
5128 case HTML_H5:
5129 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Unexpected tag </h5> found");
5130 break;
5131 case HTML_H6:
5132 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Unexpected tag </h6> found");
5133 break;
5134 case HTML_IMG:
5135 break;
5136 case HTML_HR:
5137 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Illegal </hr> tag found");
5138 break;
5139 case HTML_A:
5140 //warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Unexpected tag </a> found");
5141 // ignore </a> tag (can be part of <a name=...></a>
5142 break;
5143
5144 case XML_TERM:
5145 break;
5146 case XML_SUMMARY:
5147 retval=TK_NEWPARA;
5148 break;
5149 case XML_REMARKS:
5150 case XML_PARA:
5151 case XML_VALUE:
5152 case XML_EXAMPLE:
5153 case XML_PARAM:
5154 case XML_LIST:
5155 case XML_TYPEPARAM:
5156 case XML_RETURNS:
5157 case XML_SEE:
5158 case XML_SEEALSO:
5159 case XML_EXCEPTION:
5160 case XML_INHERITDOC:
5161 retval = RetVal_CloseXml;
5162 break;
5163 case XML_C:
5164 parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Code,tagName);
5165 break;
5166 case XML_ITEM:
5167 case XML_LISTHEADER:
5168 case XML_INCLUDE:
5169 case XML_PERMISSION:
5170 case XML_DESCRIPTION:
5171 case XML_PARAMREF:
5172 case XML_TYPEPARAMREF:
5173 // These tags are defined in .Net but are currently unsupported
5174 break;
5175 case HTML_UNKNOWN:
5176 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Unsupported xml/html tag </%s> found", qPrint(tagName));
5177 children().append<DocWord>(parser(),thisVariant(),"</"+tagName+">");
5178 break;
5179 default:
5180 // we should not get here!
5181 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Unexpected end tag %s",qPrint(tagName));
5182 ASSERT(0);
5183 break;
5184 }
5185 AUTO_TRACE_EXIT("retval={}",DocTokenizer::retvalToString(retval));
5186 return retval;
5187}

◆ handleHtmlStartTag()

int DocPara::handleHtmlStartTag ( const QCString &  tagName,
const HtmlAttribList &  tagHtmlAttribs 
)

Definition at line 4537 of file docnode.cpp.

4538{
4539 AUTO_TRACE("tagName={} #tagHtmlAttrs={}",tagName,tagHtmlAttribs.size());
4540 int retval=RetVal_OK;
4541 int tagId = Mappers::htmlTagMapper->map(tagName);
4542 if (parser()->context.token->emptyTag && !(tagId&XML_CmdMask) &&
4543 tagId!=HTML_UNKNOWN && tagId!=HTML_IMG && tagId!=HTML_BR && tagId!=HTML_HR && tagId!=HTML_P
4544 && tagId!=HTML_DIV && tagId!=HTML_SPAN)
4545 {
4546 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"HTML tag ('<%s/>') may not use the 'empty tag' XHTML syntax.",
4547 qPrint(tagName));
4548 }
4549 switch (tagId)
4550 {
4551 case HTML_UL:
4552 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag)
4553 {
4554 children().append<DocHtmlList>(parser(),thisVariant(),
4555 tagHtmlAttribs,DocHtmlList::Unordered);
4556 retval=children().get_last<DocHtmlList>()->parse();
4557 }
4558 break;
4559 case HTML_OL:
4560 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag)
4561 {
4562 children().append<DocHtmlList>(parser(),thisVariant(),
4563 tagHtmlAttribs,DocHtmlList::Ordered);
4564 retval=children().get_last<DocHtmlList>()->parse();
4565 }
4566 break;
4567 case HTML_LI:
4568 if (parser()->context.token->emptyTag) break;
4569 if (!insideUL(thisVariant()) && !insideOL(thisVariant()))
4570 {
4571 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"lonely <li> tag found");
4572 }
4573 else
4574 {
4575 retval=RetVal_ListItem;
4576 }
4577 break;
4578 case HTML_BOLD:
4579 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Bold,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4580 break;
4581 case HTML_S:
4582 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::S,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4583 break;
4584 case HTML_STRIKE:
4585 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Strike,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4586 break;
4587 case HTML_DEL:
4588 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Del,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4589 break;
4590 case HTML_UNDERLINE:
4591 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Underline,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4592 break;
4593 case HTML_INS:
4594 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Ins,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4595 break;
4596 case HTML_CODE:
4597 if (parser()->context.token->emptyTag) break;
4598 if (/*getLanguageFromFileName(parser()->context.fileName)==SrcLangExt_CSharp ||*/ parser()->context.xmlComment)
4599 // for C# source or inside a <summary> or <remark> section we
4600 // treat <code> as an XML tag (so similar to @code)
4601 {
4602 parser()->tokenizer.setStateXmlCode();
4603 retval = handleStartCode();
4604 }
4605 else // normal HTML markup
4606 {
4607 parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Code,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4608 }
4609 break;
4610 case HTML_EMPHASIS:
4611 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Italic,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4612 break;
4613 case HTML_DIV:
4614 parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Div,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4615 if (parser()->context.token->emptyTag) parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Div,tagName);
4616 break;
4617 case HTML_SPAN:
4618 parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Span,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4619 if (parser()->context.token->emptyTag) parser()->handleStyleLeave(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Span,tagName);
4620 break;
4621 case HTML_SUB:
4622 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Subscript,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4623 break;
4624 case HTML_SUP:
4625 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Superscript,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4626 break;
4627 case HTML_CENTER:
4628 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Center,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4629 break;
4630 case HTML_SMALL:
4631 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Small,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4632 break;
4633 case HTML_CITE:
4634 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Cite,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4635 break;
4636 case HTML_PRE:
4637 if (parser()->context.token->emptyTag) break;
4638 parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Preformatted,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4639 setInsidePreformatted(TRUE);
4640 parser()->tokenizer.setInsidePre(TRUE);
4641 break;
4642 case HTML_P:
4643 retval=TK_NEWPARA;
4644 break;
4645 case HTML_DL:
4646 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag)
4647 {
4648 children().append<DocHtmlDescList>(parser(),thisVariant(),tagHtmlAttribs);
4649 retval=children().get_last<DocHtmlDescList>()->parse();
4650 }
4651 break;
4652 case HTML_DT:
4653 retval = RetVal_DescTitle;
4654 break;
4655 case HTML_DD:
4656 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Unexpected tag <dd> found");
4657 break;
4658 case HTML_TABLE:
4659 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag)
4660 {
4661 children().append<DocHtmlTable>(parser(),thisVariant(),tagHtmlAttribs);
4662 retval=children().get_last<DocHtmlTable>()->parse();
4663 }
4664 break;
4665 case HTML_TR:
4666 retval = RetVal_TableRow;
4667 break;
4668 case HTML_TD:
4669 retval = RetVal_TableCell;
4670 break;
4671 case HTML_TH:
4672 retval = RetVal_TableHCell;
4673 break;
4674 case HTML_THEAD:
4675 case HTML_TBODY:
4676 case HTML_TFOOT:
4677 // for time being ignore </t....> tag
4678 break;
4679 case HTML_CAPTION:
4680 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Unexpected tag <caption> found");
4681 break;
4682 case HTML_BR:
4683 {
4684 children().append<DocLineBreak>(parser(),thisVariant(),tagHtmlAttribs);
4685 }
4686 break;
4687 case HTML_HR:
4688 {
4689 children().append<DocHorRuler>(parser(),thisVariant(),tagHtmlAttribs);
4690 }
4691 break;
4692 case HTML_A:
4693 retval = parser()->handleAHref(thisVariant(),children(),tagHtmlAttribs);
4694 break;
4695 case HTML_H1:
4696 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) retval=handleHtmlHeader(tagHtmlAttribs,1);
4697 break;
4698 case HTML_H2:
4699 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) retval=handleHtmlHeader(tagHtmlAttribs,2);
4700 break;
4701 case HTML_H3:
4702 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) retval=handleHtmlHeader(tagHtmlAttribs,3);
4703 break;
4704 case HTML_H4:
4705 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) retval=handleHtmlHeader(tagHtmlAttribs,4);
4706 break;
4707 case HTML_H5:
4708 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) retval=handleHtmlHeader(tagHtmlAttribs,5);
4709 break;
4710 case HTML_H6:
4711 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag) retval=handleHtmlHeader(tagHtmlAttribs,6);
4712 break;
4713 case HTML_IMG:
4714 {
4715 parser()->handleImg(thisVariant(),children(),tagHtmlAttribs);
4716 }
4717 break;
4718 case HTML_DETAILS:
4719 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag)
4720 {
4721 children().append<DocHtmlDetails>(parser(),thisVariant(),tagHtmlAttribs);
4722 retval=children().get_last<DocHtmlDetails>()->parse();
4723 }
4724 break;
4725 case HTML_BLOCKQUOTE:
4726 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag)
4727 {
4728 children().append<DocHtmlBlockQuote>(parser(),thisVariant(),tagHtmlAttribs);
4729 retval = children().get_last<DocHtmlBlockQuote>()->parse();
4730 }
4731 break;
4732
4733 case XML_SUMMARY:
4734 if (insideDetails(thisVariant()))
4735 {
4736 if (!parser()->context.token->emptyTag)
4737 {
4738 DocNodeVariant *n=parent();
4739 while (n && !std::holds_alternative<DocHtmlDetails>(*n)) n=::parent(n);
4740 DocHtmlDetails *d = std::get_if<DocHtmlDetails>(n);
4741 if (d)
4742 {
4743 if (!d->summary()) // details section does not have a summary yet
4744 {
4745 d->parseSummary(n,parser()->context.token->attribs);
4746 }
4747 else
4748 {
4749 retval = TK_NEWPARA;
4750 }
4751 }
4752 }
4753 }
4754 break;
4755 case XML_REMARKS:
4756 case XML_EXAMPLE:
4757 parser()->context.xmlComment=TRUE;
4758 // fall through
4759 case XML_VALUE:
4760 case XML_PARA:
4761 if (!children().empty())
4762 {
4763 retval = TK_NEWPARA;
4764 }
4765 break;
4766 case XML_DESCRIPTION:
4767 if (insideTable(thisVariant()))
4768 {
4769 retval=RetVal_TableCell;
4770 }
4771 break;
4772 case XML_C:
4773 parser()->handleStyleEnter(thisVariant(),children(),DocStyleChange::Code,tagName,&parser()->context.token->attribs);
4774 break;
4775 case XML_PARAM:
4776 case XML_TYPEPARAM:
4777 {
4778 parser()->context.xmlComment=TRUE;
4779 QCString paramName;
4780 if (findAttribute(tagHtmlAttribs,"name",&paramName))
4781 {
4782 if (paramName.isEmpty())
4783 {
4784 if (Config_getBool(WARN_NO_PARAMDOC))
4785 {
4786 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"empty 'name' attribute for <param%s> tag.",tagId==XML_PARAM?"":"type");
4787 }
4788 }
4789 else
4790 {
4791 retval = handleParamSection(paramName,
4792 tagId==XML_PARAM ? DocParamSect::Param : DocParamSect::TemplateParam,
4793 TRUE);
4794 }
4795 }
4796 else
4797 {
4798 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Missing 'name' attribute from <param%s> tag.",tagId==XML_PARAM?"":"type");
4799 }
4800 }
4801 break;
4802 case XML_PARAMREF:
4803 case XML_TYPEPARAMREF:
4804 {
4805 QCString paramName;
4806 if (findAttribute(tagHtmlAttribs,"name",&paramName))
4807 {
4808 //printf("paramName=%s\n",qPrint(paramName));
4809 children().append<DocStyleChange>(parser(),thisVariant(),parser()->context.nodeStack.size(),DocStyleChange::Italic,tagName,TRUE);
4810 children().append<DocWord>(parser(),thisVariant(),paramName);
4811 children().append<DocStyleChange>(parser(),thisVariant(),parser()->context.nodeStack.size(),DocStyleChange::Italic,tagName,FALSE);
4812 if (retval!=TK_WORD) children().append<DocWhiteSpace>(parser(),thisVariant()," ");
4813 }
4814 else
4815 {
4816 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Missing 'name' attribute from <param%sref> tag.",tagId==XML_PARAMREF?"":"type");
4817 }
4818 }
4819 break;
4820 case XML_EXCEPTION:
4821 {
4822 parser()->context.xmlComment=TRUE;
4823 QCString exceptName;
4824 if (findAttribute(tagHtmlAttribs,"cref",&exceptName))
4825 {
4826 unescapeCRef(exceptName);
4827 retval = handleParamSection(exceptName,DocParamSect::Exception,TRUE);
4828 }
4829 else
4830 {
4831 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Missing 'cref' attribute from <exception> tag.");
4832 }
4833 }
4834 break;
4835 case XML_ITEM:
4836 case XML_LISTHEADER:
4837 if (insideTable(thisVariant()))
4838 {
4839 retval=RetVal_TableRow;
4840 }
4841 else if (insideUL(thisVariant()) || insideOL(thisVariant()))
4842 {
4843 retval=RetVal_ListItem;
4844 }
4845 else
4846 {
4847 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"lonely <item> tag found");
4848 }
4849 break;
4850 case XML_RETURNS:
4851 parser()->context.xmlComment=TRUE;
4852 retval = handleSimpleSection(DocSimpleSect::Return,TRUE);
4853 parser()->context.hasReturnCommand=TRUE;
4854 break;
4855 case XML_TERM:
4856 if (insideTable(thisVariant()))
4857 {
4858 retval=RetVal_TableCell;
4859 }
4860 break;
4861 case XML_SEE:
4862 // I'm not sure if <see> is the same as <seealso> or if it
4863 // should you link a member without producing a section. The
4864 // C# specification is extremely vague about this (but what else
4865 // can we expect from Microsoft...)
4866 {
4867 QCString cref;
4868 //printf("XML_SEE: empty tag=%d\n",parser()->context.token->emptyTag);
4869 if (findAttribute(tagHtmlAttribs,"cref",&cref))
4870 {
4871 unescapeCRef(cref);
4872 if (parser()->context.token->emptyTag) // <see cref="..."/> style
4873 {
4874 bool inSeeBlock = parser()->context.inSeeBlock;
4875 parser()->context.token->name = cref;
4876 parser()->context.inSeeBlock = TRUE;
4877 parser()->handleLinkedWord(thisVariant(),children(),TRUE);
4878 parser()->context.inSeeBlock = inSeeBlock;
4879 }
4880 else // <see cref="...">...</see> style
4881 {
4882 //DocRef *ref = new DocRef(this,cref);
4883 //children().append(ref);
4884 //ref->parse();
4885 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
4886 children().append<DocLink>(parser(),thisVariant(),cref);
4887 DocLink *lnk = children().get_last<DocLink>();
4888 QCString leftOver = lnk->parse(FALSE,TRUE);
4889 if (!leftOver.isEmpty())
4890 {
4891 children().append<DocWord>(parser(),thisVariant(),leftOver);
4892 }
4893 }
4894 }
4895 else if (findAttribute(tagHtmlAttribs,"langword",&cref)) // <see langword="..."/> or <see langword="..."></see>
4896 {
4897 bool inSeeBlock = parser()->context.inSeeBlock;
4898 parser()->context.token->name = cref;
4899 parser()->context.inSeeBlock = TRUE;
4900 children().append<DocStyleChange>(parser(),thisVariant(),parser()->context.nodeStack.size(),DocStyleChange::Code,tagName,TRUE);
4901 parser()->handleLinkedWord(thisVariant(),children(),TRUE);
4902 children().append<DocStyleChange>(parser(),thisVariant(),parser()->context.nodeStack.size(),DocStyleChange::Code,tagName,FALSE);
4903 parser()->context.inSeeBlock = inSeeBlock;
4904 }
4905 else
4906 {
4907 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Missing 'cref' or 'langword' attribute from <see> tag.");
4908 }
4909 }
4910 break;
4911 case XML_SEEALSO:
4912 {
4913 parser()->context.xmlComment=TRUE;
4914 QCString cref;
4915 if (findAttribute(tagHtmlAttribs,"cref",&cref))
4916 {
4917 unescapeCRef(cref);
4918 // Look for an existing "see" section
4919 DocNodeVariant *vss=0;
4920 for (auto &n : children())
4921 {
4922 DocSimpleSect *candidate = std::get_if<DocSimpleSect>(&n);
4923 if (candidate && candidate->type()==DocSimpleSect::See)
4924 {
4925 vss = &n;
4926 }
4927 }
4928
4929 if (!vss) // start new section
4930 {
4931 children().append<DocSimpleSect>(parser(),thisVariant(),DocSimpleSect::See);
4932 vss = &children().back();
4933 }
4934
4935 std::get<DocSimpleSect>(*vss).appendLinkWord(cref);
4936 retval = RetVal_OK;
4937 }
4938 else
4939 {
4940 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Missing 'cref' attribute from <seealso> tag.");
4941 }
4942 }
4943 break;
4944 case XML_LIST:
4945 {
4946 QCString type;
4947 findAttribute(tagHtmlAttribs,"type",&type);
4948 DocHtmlList::Type listType = DocHtmlList::Unordered;
4949 HtmlAttribList emptyList;
4950 if (type=="number")
4951 {
4952 listType=DocHtmlList::Ordered;
4953 }
4954 if (type=="table")
4955 {
4956 children().append<DocHtmlTable>(parser(),thisVariant(),emptyList);
4957 retval=children().get_last<DocHtmlTable>()->parseXml();
4958 }
4959 else
4960 {
4961 children().append<DocHtmlList>(parser(),thisVariant(),emptyList,listType);
4962 retval=children().get_last<DocHtmlList>()->parseXml();
4963 }
4964 }
4965 break;
4966 case XML_INCLUDE:
4967 case XML_PERMISSION:
4968 // These tags are defined in .Net but are currently unsupported
4969 parser()->context.xmlComment=TRUE;
4970 break;
4971 case HTML_UNKNOWN:
4972 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Unsupported xml/html tag <%s> found", qPrint(tagName));
4973 children().append<DocWord>(parser(),thisVariant(), "<"+tagName+parser()->context.token->attribsStr+">");
4974 break;
4975 case XML_INHERITDOC:
4976 handleInheritDoc();
4977 break;
4978 default:
4979 // we should not get here!
4980 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"Unexpected start tag %s",qPrint(tagName));
4981 ASSERT(0);
4982 break;
4983 }
4984 AUTO_TRACE_EXIT("retval={}",DocTokenizer::retvalToString(retval));
4985 return retval;
4986}

3604{
3605 AUTO_TRACE("cmdName={}",cmdName);
3606 QCString saveCmdName = cmdName;
3607 int tok=parser()->tokenizer.lex();
3608 bool isBlock = false;
3609 if (tok==TK_WORD && parser()->context.token->name=="{")
3610 {
3611 parser()->tokenizer.setStateOptions();
3612 tok=parser()->tokenizer.lex();
3613 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
3614 StringVector optList=split(parser()->context.token->name.str(),",");
3615 auto contains = [&optList](const char *kw)
3616 {
3617 return std::find(optList.begin(),optList.end(),kw)!=optList.end();
3618 };
3619 if (t==DocInclude::Include && contains("lineno"))
3620 {
3621 t = DocInclude::IncWithLines;
3622 }
3623 else if (t==DocInclude::Snippet && contains("lineno"))
3624 {
3625 t = DocInclude::SnipWithLines;
3626 }
3627 else if (t==DocInclude::DontInclude && contains("lineno"))
3628 {
3629 t = DocInclude::DontIncWithLines;
3630 }
3631 else if (t==DocInclude::Include && contains("doc"))
3632 {
3633 t = DocInclude::IncludeDoc;
3634 }
3635 else if (t==DocInclude::Snippet && contains("doc"))
3636 {
3637 t = DocInclude::SnippetDoc;
3638 }
3639 else if (t==DocInclude::Snippet && contains("trimleft"))
3640 {
3641 t = DocInclude::SnippetTrimLeft;
3642 }
3643 tok=parser()->tokenizer.lex();
3644 if (tok!=TK_WHITESPACE)
3645 {
3646 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"expected whitespace after \\%s command",
3647 qPrint(saveCmdName));
3648 return;
3649 }
3650 }
3651 else if (tok==TK_WORD && parser()->context.token->name=="[")
3652 {
3653 parser()->tokenizer.setStateBlock();
3654 tok=parser()->tokenizer.lex();
3655 isBlock = (parser()->context.token->name.stripWhiteSpace() == "block");
3656 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
3657 tok=parser()->tokenizer.lex();
3658 }
3659 else if (tok!=TK_WHITESPACE)
3660 {
3661 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"expected whitespace after \\%s command",
3662 qPrint(saveCmdName));
3663 return;
3664 }
3665 parser()->tokenizer.setStateFile();
3666 tok=parser()->tokenizer.lex();
3667 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
3668 if (tok==0)
3669 {
3670 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"unexpected end of comment block while parsing the "
3671 "argument of command %s",qPrint(saveCmdName));
3672 return;
3673 }
3674 else if (tok!=TK_WORD)
3675 {
3676 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"unexpected token %s as the argument of %s",
3677 DocTokenizer::tokToString(tok),qPrint(saveCmdName));
3678 return;
3679 }
3680 QCString fileName = parser()->context.token->name;
3681 QCString blockId;
3682 if (t==DocInclude::Snippet || t==DocInclude::SnipWithLines || t==DocInclude::SnippetDoc || t == DocInclude::SnippetTrimLeft)
3683 {
3684 if (fileName == "this") fileName=parser()->context.fileName;
3685 parser()->tokenizer.setStateSnippet();
3686 tok=parser()->tokenizer.lex();
3687 parser()->tokenizer.setStatePara();
3688 if (tok!=TK_WORD)
3689 {
3690 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"expected block identifier, but found token %s instead while parsing the %s command",
3691 DocTokenizer::tokToString(tok),qPrint(saveCmdName));
3692 return;
3693 }
3694 blockId = "["+parser()->context.token->name+"]";
3695 }
3696
3697 // This is the only place to handle the \includedoc and \snippetdoc commands,
3698 // as the content is included here as if it is really here.
3699 if (t==DocInclude::IncludeDoc || t==DocInclude::SnippetDoc)
3700 {
3701 QCString inc_text;
3702 int inc_line = 1;
3703 parser()->readTextFileByName(fileName,inc_text);
3704 if (t==DocInclude::SnippetDoc)
3705 {
3706 int count;
3707 if (!blockId.isEmpty() && (count=inc_text.contains(blockId.data()))!=2)
3708 {
3709 warn_doc_error(parser()->context.fileName,parser()->tokenizer.getLineNr(),"block marked with %s for \\snippet should appear twice in file %s, found it %d times",
3710 qPrint(blockId),qPrint(fileName),count);
3711 }
3712 inc_line = lineBlock(inc_text, blockId);
3713 inc_text = extractBlock(inc_text, blockId);
3714 }
3715
3716 Markdown markdown(fileName,inc_line);
3717 QCString strippedDoc = stripIndentation(inc_text);
3718 QCString processedDoc = Config_getBool(MARKDOWN_SUPPORT) ? markdown.process(strippedDoc,inc_line) : strippedDoc;
3719
3720 parser()->pushContext();
3721 parser()->context.fileName = fileName;
3722 parser()->tokenizer.setLineNr(inc_line);
3723 parser()->internalValidatingParseDoc(thisVariant(),children(),processedDoc);
3724 parser()->popContext();
3725 }
3726 else
3727 {
3728 children().append<DocInclude>(parser(),thisVariant(),fileName,
3729 parser()->context.context,t,
3730 parser()->context.isExample,
3731 parser()->context.exampleName,
3732 blockId,isBlock);
3733 children().get_last<DocInclude>()->parse();
3734 }
3735}

3441{
3442 AUTO_TRACE("cmdName={}",cmdName);

3474 parser()->context.exampleName);

3477 DocWhiteSpace *n1_docWs = std::get_if<DocWhiteSpace >(n1);
3478 DocIncOperator *n2_docIncOp = std::get_if<DocIncOperator>(n2);
3479 bool isFirst = !n1 || // no last node
3480 (!n1_docIncOp && !n1_docWs) || // last node is not operator or whitespace
3481 (n1_docWs && n2 && !n2_docIncOp); // last node is not operator
3482 op->markFirst(isFirst);
3483 op->markLast(true);
3484 if (n1_docIncOp)
3485 {
3486 n1_docIncOp->markLast(false);
3487 }
3488 else if (n1_docWs && n2_docIncOp)
3489 {
3490 n2_docIncOp->markLast(false);
3491 }
3492 op->parse();
3493}

5252

5283 {

5307 goto endparagraph;

5309 }
5310 break;

5335 // fall through

5343 {
5344 n=::parent(n);

5349 {

5361 {

5393 else if (retval>0 && retval<RetVal_OK)

5400 // or some auto list marker

5406 case TK_HTMLTAG:
5407 {

5409 {
5410 retval = handleHtmlStartTag(parser()->context.token->name,parser()->context.token->attribs);

5423 {

5445 {
5446 n=::parent(n);

5449 {
